3305660.name: Hero Siege - Bard (Class)
3305660.description:
Shred the battlefield with face-melting solos and thunderous riffs! The Bard storms into Hero Siege with amps cranked to 11, fusing the fury of death metal with the raw brutality of the pit. Channel the storm as a Metal Guitarist, wielding lightning-infused chords that stun, shock, and incinerate your foes. Or dive headfirst into the chaos as a Pit Fighter, a whirlwind of fists, boots, and brutal rhythm, turning moshpits into murderfields. Playstyle: Play as the Lightning caster Metal Guitarist using your guitar and amplifiers unleashing sound on a desibel level of an OSHA violation with pure stage charisma, or choose the more hands on Physical way as the Pit Fighter to whip your hair around summoning other pit fighters to punish your foes in a pit filled with beach balls! Recommended for:

  • Caster enjoyers who want lots of electric area of effect,

  • Physical fighter enjoyers who want to shred at a closer range,

  • If you like the sound an electric guitar makes,

Get your amplifiers ready, tune your guitar and lets dive into the crowd! For heavy metal we will die!
3305660.supported_languages:
英语*, 芬兰语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 俄语, 简体中文, 日语, 韩语, 德语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
